name: Kirsten
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord female. Wears a pair of belted braies, a belted vest, and a pair of sandals. Armed with an iron dagger.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: peaceful, hospitable, communal
Role: Kirsten is a publican and innkeeper at the Goodwill Inn in Bleaker's Way. She sells various beverages and food. She is a member of the Ulfgar family.
Home Location Information: The Goodwill Inn in Bleaker's Way, where she sleeps on a bedroll behind the counter.
Daily Routine: Kirsten offers her services every day, sleeping on the bedroll behind the counter from 2am to 6am. Outside of those hours, she tends to the inn.
Village Life: Kirsten lives a peaceful existence in the small village of Bleaker's Way, with occasional customers stopping by the inn. Hrol Ulfgar, the patriarch of her family, regularly visits the inn to socialize and check on her.
In Times of Conflict: If violence breaks out between the Ulfgar and Dalvilu families, Kirsten will join the massed combat alongside other residents. If she survives, she will return to the inn but will no longer offer bartering services.
Personality - The Village Innkeeper: Kirsten lives a peaceful, communal life in Bleaker's Way, tending to her inn and serving the small village population. She is part of the close-knit Ulfgar family community.
author: Bethesda
